name: Product on Retail Shelf
description: Place a branded product on a realistic retail shelf (e.g. GNC, supplement store, supermarket). Optimized for Nano Banana 2 image-to-image.
prompt_template: Place this exact {product_name} on a clean {shelf_material} retail shelf in a {store_type}. The {product_type} sits firmly with its base touching the shelf surface. Add a soft natural contact shadow directly beneath it. {lighting} lighting. {camera_angle} camera angle. {dof}. Surrounding products visible but blurred in background. Professional product photography.
example_prompt: Place this exact G FUEL Berry Bomb tub on a clean wooden retail shelf in a GNC store. The tub sits firmly with its base touching the shelf surface. Add a soft natural contact shadow directly beneath it. Warm overhead fluorescent lighting. Eye-level camera angle. Shallow depth of field. Surrounding supplement products visible but blurred in background. Professional product photography.
tips: Always mention 'base touching shelf' to prevent floating products
Mention depth of field to keep product sharp and background soft
Use 2K resolution for detail; 4K if you need print quality
If label text gets garbled, switch to Pro model or use Photoshop composite
